title: 🏷️ LAP TIME
data_structure:
```
[
    {
        name: 'time',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: true,
        example: 'PT1M33.294S',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['mandatory', 'string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'driver_name',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: true,
        example: 'Klaus Ludwig',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'date',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: '1996-08-03',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
]
```
